creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 182884
Update x11/tint to 0.14.5

The attached patch updates x11/tint to version 0.14.5. Changes to the port are:

- Version bump.
- Necessary changes to the pkg-plist.
- A new patch to CMakeLists.txt. This one is required, otherwise the configuration file would be installed into /etc.

Changes to the application are:

- Mostly bugfixes.
- Add a new plugin for buttons.

The update was tested with Poudriere and I've run it for several hours on my desktop.
